Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
313 
STATE_NAME 
LABEL: 
Segment State Name 
DESCRIPTION: Name of state in which the plan benefit package (segment) provides coverage. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
25 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS).
